suites.title: Incident Auto-Priority Assignment Based on Impact and Urgency

specs.title: High Impact + High Urgency = Critical Priority (P1)
High Impact + Medium Urgency = High Priority (P2)
High Impact + Low Urgency = Moderate Priority (P3)
Medium Impact + High Urgency = High Priority (P2)
Medium Impact + Medium Urgency = Moderate Priority (P3)
Medium Impact + Low Urgency = Low Priority (P4)
Low Impact + High Urgency = Moderate Priority (P3)
Low Impact + Medium Urgency = Low Priority (P4)
Low Impact + Low Urgency = Planning Priority (P5)
Create a P1 incident with required fields and validate priority engine
Priority field cannot be manually overridden

specs.title: Assigning the incident moves state to In Progress
SLA response and resolution timers are active
Stakeholders are notified when P1 incident is created
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=1 - High, urgency=1 - High, expected_priority=1 - Critical)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=1 - High, urgency=2 - Medium, expected_priority=2 - High)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=1 - High, urgency=3 - Low, expected_priority=3 - Moderate)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=2 - Medium, urgency=1 - High, expected_priority=2 - High)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=2 - Medium, urgency=2 - Medium, expected_priority=3 - Moderate)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=2 - Medium, urgency=3 - Low, expected_priority=4 - Low)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=3 - Low, urgency=1 - High, expected_priority=3 - Moderate)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=3 - Low, urgency=2 - Medium, expected_priority=4 - Low)
Priority is calculated from impact and urgency (impact=3 - Low, urgency=3 - Low, expected_priority=5 - Planning)

suites.title: Priority Field is Read-Only on Incident Form

specs.title: Priority field is read-only on new incident
Priority field is read-only on existing incident

suites.title: Priority Recalculates When Impact or Urgency Changes

specs.title: Priority upgrades when urgency is raised on existing incident
Priority upgrades when impact is raised on existing incident
Priority jumps to Critical when both impact and urgency are raised
